ol.li: ColumnOps trait defines common operations (len, swap, push_raw).
Vec<T> implements trait for any T: 'static.
Type info is preserved via a TypeId field to ensure safe downcasting.

ul.li: Pro: Enables storage of heterogeneous columns in a single HashMap.
Pro: Preserves strict type safety through runtime TypeId checks.
Con: Heap allocation per column container.
Con: Virtual dispatch overhead for generic ops.
